index.title: Onye ntụgharị akụrụngwa
index.description: Mepee igwe sụgharịrị arịrịọ maka faịlụ akụ na repo ọ bụla, na usoro ọ bụla.
index.badge: v3.0 — Node 24, repo config, glossary, akọrọ na-agba ọsọ
index.lede: Resource Translator na-emepe arịrịọ ndị a sụgharịrị igwe maka faịlụ akụ gị site na iji Azure AI Translator site na SDK gọọmentị — enweghị ọrụ ndị ọzọ, naanị arụmọrụ.
index.workflowTitle: Nsụgharị dị ka ọrụ, ọ bụghị ịrụ ọrụ.
index.workflowBody: Dobe ihe ahụ n'ime CI gị dị ugbu a, tụọ ya na Azure AI Translator, ma kwe ka repo gị kwuo asụsụ ọ bụla ị lekwasịrị anya.

config.title: Repo-larịị config
config.body: Dobe .github / resource-translator.yml maka gụnyere globs, glossaries, na Custom Translator edemede.

glossary.title: Glossary-maara
glossary.body: Mechie aha aha na okwu ngwaahịa na smart okwu-ókè regex nke na-ejikwa C ++, .NET, na ndị enyi.

dryRun.title: Akọrọ-na-agba ọsọ + soft-ọdịda
dryRun.body: Nyochaa nsụgharị na-enweghị ide faịlụ, ma ọ bụ gosipụta njehie ọ bụla dị ka ịdọ aka ná ntị mgbe ị na-emegharị.

outputs.title: PR-enyi na enyi mmepụta
outputs.body: summary-title, summary-details, and has-new-translations slot directly into create-pull-request.

sdk.title: Official Azure SDK
sdk.body: Wuru na @azure-rest / ai-translation-text + @azure / core-rest-pipeline — akpaka retries na 408/429/5xx, ọ dịghị aka-akpọrepu HTTP. esbuild-bundled, audit-clean.

getting-started.title: Ịmalite
getting-started.lede: Tinye faịlụ arụmọrụ, tụọ ya na nzere Azure AI Translator gị, na ihe ahụ — nke e wuru na SDK gọọmentị Microsoft @azure-rest / ai-translation-text — ga-enyocha repo maka faịlụ akụ asụsụ isi mmalite ma wepụta ụmụnne ndị a sụgharịrị sụgharịrị.

provision.title: Inye ihe Azure AI Translator resource
provision.body: Mepụta ihe ntụgharị ntụgharị Azure AI na ọnụ ụzọ Azure, wee chekwaa ihe ndị a dị ka ihe nzuzo nchekwa GitHub ka ọrụ ahụ wee nwee ike ịgụ ha:
provision.key: Pịa igodo ndebanye aha maka ihe onwunwe ahụ.

resource.title: Tinye faịlụ isi iyi
resource.body: Ngwaọrụ ndị a na-eji aha ahụ eme ihe. <sourceLocale>. <ext> mgbakọ. Dịka ọmụmaatụ Greetings.en.resx na-aghọ Greetings.fr.resx, Greetings.de.resx, na ihe ndị ọzọ mgbe ọ na-agba ọsọ.

output.title: Nyochaa mmepụta
output.body: Ozugbo arụmọrụ ahụ gwụchara, ihe ahụ na-ekpughe nsonaazụ atọ ị nwere ike ịbanye na nkọwa PR: nchịkọta-aha, nchịkọta-nkọwa, na nsụgharị ọhụrụ. Ọ na-edekwa nchịkọta Markdown n'ime ibe ọrụ site na core.summary.

nextSteps.title: Nzọụkwụ ndị ọzọ
nextSteps.recipes: Lee ntụziaka maka monorepos, omenala glossaries, na Omenala Translator edemede.

configuration.title: Nhazi
configuration.lede: Gosipụta ndabara otu ugboro na .github/resource-translator.yml ma kwe ka ọrụ ọ bụla keta ha. Action inputs mgbe niile na-emeri mgbe ha abụọ.

inputs.title: Ntinye na mmepụta
inputs.lede: A na-anabatakwa ntinye ọ bụla na faịlụ repo config. Mgbe a na-edozi ha abụọ, ntinye ihe na-emeri.

formats.title: Ụdị faịlụ
formats.lede: Isii gburugburu-trippable akụ formats. Ihe omume ahụ na-agụ faịlụ isi mmalite ọ bụla, sụgharịa ụkpụrụ, ma dee nwanne nwoke kwa mpaghara ezubere iche.

recipes.title: Ntụziaka
recipes.lede: Common nakawa etu esi maka mbupu nsụgharị: monorepos, glossaries, omenala edemede, akọrọ na-agba ọsọ, na ụda akara.

faq.title: Ajụjụ ana ajukari
faq.lede: Azịza ngwa ngwa maka ajụjụ ndị na-abịakarị mgbe ị na-eme ihe omume ahụ.

translations.title: Nsụgharị
translations.filterPlaceholder: Chọọ site na asụsụ, koodu, ma ọ bụ aha ala.
translations.translationPending: Translation pending — open a translate-docs run.
translations.noLocales: Enweghị mpaghara dabara na nzacha ahụ.
translations.howItWorks: Olee otú nke a si arụ ọrụ

contributing.title: Inye aka
contributing.lede: A na-anabata akụkọ bug, arịrịọ atụmatụ, na arịrịọ eserese. Ihe omume ahụ dị ntakịrị iji bụrụ enyi na enyi nye ndị na-enye aka oge mbụ.

changelog.title: Ndekọ mgbanwe
changelog.lede: Nchịkọta dị elu nke ntọhapụ. Canonical, ikike changelog na-ebi n'CHANGELOG.md na ebe nchekwa.
